title: The Goal of My Life
overview: Uğur, a fanatical Fenerbahçe fan, is a pharmaceutical representative. While he has a very calm personality in his daily life, he becomes a completely different person when it comes to football. His desire to win and his totems are what set him apart from other fanatics. Uğur, who lives with his mother and sister, is tired of his mother's pressure to get married. When it comes to marriage, Pınar also faces the same pressure from her mother. Uğur and Pınar meet by chance after a traffic accident. This encounter will bring about profound changes in both Uğur's and Pınar's lives.
